creator: Hermes.TK@microchip.com
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)
Please find the below information with  13.1 installed

root@13_1:~ # uname -KU
1301000 1301000
root@13_1:~ # uname -r
13.1-RELEASE
root@13_1:~ # sysctl vfs.zfs.min_auto_ashift
sysctl: unknown oid 'vfs.zfs.min_auto_ashift'

Regards
Hermes T K
